_comment: Test bench for task5_speller_api. OWNER: Mohamed Nady (work package M2). TODO: fill with at least 12 cases covering prefix lengths 1/2/3, three distinct contexts (casual chat with a friend, formal email to a professor, ordering food at a restaurant), ambiguous prefixes (th, a), awkward prefixes (xy, qz), and empty-context cases. For each case write a plain-English description of what a 'good' output looks like — do NOT assert exact strings, LLM outputs vary.

cases.name: 2-letter formal email (seed example)
cases.context: writing an email to my professor
cases.good_output: Three common English words starting with 'he' in a formal register, e.g. 'hello', 'hope', 'help'.
